Transmembrane mucin; OR=1.162 (95%CI 1.106-1.219); EAF=0.568; eQTL coloc PP.H4=0.616 blood; risk allele increases MUC1 expression; in TRIM46 intron; 7-SNP credible set PIP=0.208; replicated GBMI p=8.02e-3; distinct from MUC5B (chr11); pleiotropic with urate (p=1.5e-101) and haematocrit (p=4.7e-41)
91.6kb downstream of LSM3; MAF 6%; taurine transporter near locus; third novel signal from Chin 2025

Netrin-4; OR=1.153 (95%CI 1.098-1.212); EAF=0.582; in 3'-UTR of SNRPF; 5-SNP credible set PIP=0.376; replicated GBMI p=4.69e-5; coloc PP.H4=0.649 lung (highest at locus); sQTL support; risk allele also decreases lung function (p=7.8e-45); NTN4 highly expressed in aberrant basaloid cells (IPF-specific; Adams 2020 SciAdv PMID:32832599); disrupts laminin-gamma1 basement membranes (NatComm PMID:27901020); anti-senescence/anti-inflammatory in ECs (PMID:33636396)

Spindly; rare missense p.Arg20Gln; combined p=2.2e-20 with FinnGen; ExWAS; antagonistic pleiotropy: IPF risk but cancer protective; gain-of-function→senescence→fibrosis; Finnish-enriched; connects with MAD1L1/KIF15/KNL1
Novel protective locus; 100kGP WGS + meta-analysis (n=11700 IPF vs 1.4M controls); eBioMedicine 2025; MCL1=BCL-2 family anti-apoptotic regulator; near S100A gene cluster
